query: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO block_tag_refs (source_id, tag_id) SELECT ?1, je.value FROM json_each(?2) je WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM blocks WHERE id = je.value AND block_type = 'tag' AND deleted_at IS NULL) AND (?3 IS NULL OR ?3 = ( SELECT space_id FROM blocks WHERE id = je.value AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1))
